source.definition: a written work containing the dialogue and instructions for a film, play, or television program

explanation.sourceText: The English word "screenplay" combines "screen," referring to the movie screen, and "play," indicating a dramatic work. It denotes the script used for films or theatrical productions.
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul englezesc „screenplay“ combină „screen“ (ecranul filmului) și „play“ (piesă de teatru), desemnând scenariul folosit pentru filme sau producții teatrale.

source.additional: A good screenplay is the foundation for any successful film or theatrical performance.

target.definition: o lucrare scrisă care conține dialoguri și instrucțiuni pentru un film, o piesă de teatru sau un program de televiziune

explanation.sourceText: The Romanian word "scenariul" derives from the French "scénario," which describes the script or plan for a film or theatrical performance.
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul românesc „scenariul“ provine din francezul „scénario“, care desemnează planul sau textul pentru un film sau piesă de teatru.

target.additional: Das Szenar Skript enthält die Dialoge und Regieranweisungen.

explanation.sourceText: The specific script written for a film.

examples.sourceText: The screenplay for the new film is excellent.
examples.targetText: Scenariul pentru noul film este excelent.

explanation.sourceText: The script written for a theatrical play.
explanation.targetText: Textul pentru o piesă de teatru.

examples.sourceText: The screenplay was adapted for the theater.
examples.targetText: Scenariul a fost adaptat pentru teatru.

explanation.sourceText: The script written for a television program.
explanation.targetText: Textul pentru un program de televiziune.

examples.sourceText: A good screenplay is the key to television success.
examples.targetText: Un scenariu bun este cheia succesului la televizor.

examples.sourceText: The screenplay for the new film is excellent.
examples.targetText: Scenariul pentru noul film este excelent.

examples.sourceText: A screenplay may require several revisions.
examples.targetText: Un scenariu poate necesita mai multe revizuiri.

examples.sourceText: The filming of the screenplay was a great success.
examples.targetText: Filmarea scenariului a fost un mare succes.
Autorii de scenarii poartă o mare responsabilitate.

examples.sourceText: The plot of the screenplay is exciting and surprising.
examples.targetText: Acțiunea scenariului este captivantă și surprinzătoare.

examples.sourceText: A good screenplay is the key to a successful film.
examples.targetText: Un scenariu bun este cheia unui film de succes.

learningTips.text: Remember that "scenariul" sounds like the French "scenario," which is closely related to the English "screenplay"—think of it as the blueprint for your favorite movie scenes.
Every good "scenariul" tells an engaging story—imagine it as the script that brings characters and plots to life.
Connect "scenariul" with movies and plays you know, as it represents the written plan behind them.
When you hear "scenariul," think of the screenplay directors use to guide actors and production.
